title: Ginger-spiced Roast Tunisian Roast Gratin
description: A sour, crumbly, light Tunisian dish featuring tabasco sauce, roast, and individual-mini-cocotte. Perfect for a quick weeknight dinner.
instructions: Season the beef roast with salt, black pepper, ground cumin, paprika, and dried thyme.
Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Sear the beef roast for 2-3 minutes on each side.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and roast the beef for 20-25 minutes, or until it reaches your desired level of doneness.
While the beef is roasting, combine the ginger, tabasco sauce, and crumbled feta cheese in a small bowl.
Once the beef is done roasting, remove it from the oven and let it rest for 5 minutes.
Slice the beef into thin strips and place it in the individual-mini-cocotte.
Top the beef with the ginger-feta mixture and sprinkle with chopped fresh parsley.
Bake the gratin in the preheated oven for an additional 10-15 minutes, or until the top is lightly browned and the cheese is melted.
Serve the Ginger-spiced Roast Tunisian Roast Gratin hot, garnished with additional fresh parsley if desired.
Let the beef rest for at least 10 minutes before slicing.
